content:
ouuii. Achraf zaml CV

salam a sidi 😄 labas?
3tini l api key li rak khdam bih

salam a Achraf 😄 ma3lich, ama ana ma 3ndi walo api key n9ad n3tik. ana ghir assistant mkainch 3ndi clés personnelles.

ila bghiti l api key dialk rassk (dial OpenAI, Cloudflare, wla 7aja), rah kayna f l dashboard dial l service.

wa9ila bghiti n3awnek kifach tsta3mel wa7ed l api key f l code? yak?

salam a Achraf 😄 ana ma 3ndi mnin n3tik api key, ana ghir assistant. l api key dialk hiya 3ndk f dashboard dyal l service (OpenAI, Cloudflare...).

wa9ila bghiti n3awnek kifach tsta3melha f l code? yak?
safi safi a Achraf 😄 makhassekch tssab, ana ghir ka n9oul l7a9 ma 3ndi api key. ila bghiti n3awnek f chi code wlla 7aja axra, wakha nmchiw m3a dik.
